ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Paper2mdviallm is the default path. Scholar-md stays available as a lighter beta path. Marker remains optional and not recommended.
ast.target: Paper2mdviallm 是默认路径。Scholar-md 作为更轻量的测试版路径保持可用。Marker 仍然是可选的且不推荐。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional. Resolution order: explicit setting, plugin .venv local tool, then shell PATH. You can paste either the executable itself or an environment root such as a conda env. The plugin resolves `bin/paper2mdviallm` or `Scripts/paper2mdviallm.exe` inside it.
ast.target: 可选。解析顺序：显式设置、插件 .venv 本地工具，然后是 shell PATH。您可以粘贴可执行文件本身或环境根目录（例如 conda 环境）。插件会在其中解析 `bin/paper2mdviallm` 或 `Scripts/paper2mdviallm.exe`。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used by paper2mdviallm. The provider is inferred from the model name, so API keys stay global and only need to be filled once.
ast.target: 由 paper2mdviallm 使用。提供程序从模型名称推断，因此 API 密钥保持全局性，只需填写一次。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only used when the backend is paper2mdviallm. Higher values are faster but cost more API work in parallel.
ast.target: 仅在后端为 paper2mdviallm 时使用。数值越高，速度越快，但并行 API 工作量也越大。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional. Only used when the backend is marker CLI, which is not recommended.
ast.target: 可选。仅在后端为 marker CLI 时使用，不推荐。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Stored in this plugin's Obsidian data.json for compatibility with older supported Obsidian versions.
ast.target: 存储在此插件的 Obsidian data.json 中，以兼容较旧的 Obsidian 版本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used for key-sentence highlighting plus term discovery and explanation after Markdown import.
ast.target: 用于 Markdown 导入后的关键句高亮以及术语发现与解释。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This can differ from the Markdown generation model above. One-click import and reading prep stays available either way.
ast.target: 这可以与上面的 Markdown 生成模型不同。一键导入和阅读准备功能无论如何都可用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, import runs key-sentence highlighting before glossary preprocessing.
ast.target: 启用后，导入时会在术语表预处理前运行关键句高亮。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Medium matches the current behavior. Sparse highlights only structurally important sentences.
ast.target: 中等匹配当前行为。稀疏高亮仅针对结构上重要的句子。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The default is 40. Higher values cost more and take longer.
ast.target: 默认值为 40。数值越高，成本越高，耗时越长。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls newly generated glossary entries. Standard stores a fuller contextual definition plus cluster notes. Concise stores a 30-50 word definition plus cluster notes. Rebuild glossary entries to refresh existing cache.
ast.target: 控制新生成的术语表条目。标准存储更完整的上下文定义及聚类笔记。简洁存储 30-50 词的定义及聚类笔记。重建术语表条目以刷新现有缓存。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: After glossary entries are prepared, fetch matching Stanford encyclopedia introductions and cache a short supplement for hover.
ast.target: 术语表条目准备就绪后，获取匹配的斯坦福百科全书介绍，并为悬停缓存一个简短的补充说明。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Milliseconds before the hover tooltip appears. Reload Obsidian after changing this.
ast.target: 悬停工具提示出现前的毫秒数。更改此设置后请重新加载 Obsidian。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Auto highlight key sentences after import
ast.target: 导入后自动高亮关键句

ast.name: setText
ast.target: 尚无准备好的术语表条目。

ast.name: setTitle
ast.source: Import PDF and prepare for reading
ast.target: 导入 PDF 并准备阅读

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 仅将 PDF 转换为 Markdown

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 使用 SEP 丰富术语表

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Set the marker CLI path in settings first.
ast.target: 请先在设置中设置 marker CLI 路径。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: PDF import requires a local filesystem vault.
ast.target: PDF 导入需要本地文件系统库。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: PDF imported. Key sentence highlighting and glossary preprocessing are running in the background.
ast.target: PDF 已导入。关键句高亮和术语表预处理正在后台运行。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: PDF imported. Glossary preprocessing is running in the background. Check _glossary/_status.md for progress.
ast.target: PDF 已导入。术语表预处理正在后台运行。请检查 _glossary/_status.md 了解进度。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The file was converted. Run the extract command when you are ready.
ast.target: 文件已转换。准备好后运行提取命令。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 正在使用 marker 转换 PDF...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No multi-sentence prose paragraphs were eligible for key-sentence highlighting.
ast.target: 没有符合条件的多句散文段落可用于关键句高亮。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No key sentences were selected for highlighting.
ast.target: 没有选择关键句进行高亮。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No readable paragraphs found in this paper.
ast.target: 在此论文中未找到可读段落。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Glossary is already prepared for the top discovered terms.
ast.target: 术语表已为发现的顶级术语准备就绪。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Sep enrichment is already cached for the selected glossary entries.
ast.target: SEP 丰富已为选定的术语表条目缓存。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Local paper2mdviallm was not found in this plugin's .venv.
ast.target: 在此插件的 .venv 中未找到本地 paper2mdviallm。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: CLI path for paper2mdviallm set to the local tool.
ast.target: paper2mdviallm 的 CLI 路径已设置为本地工具。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Local marker_single was not found in this plugin's .venv.
ast.target: 在此插件的 .venv 中未找到本地 marker_single。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: CLI path for marker set to the local command.
ast.target: marker 的 CLI 路径已设置为本地命令。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Return the requested structured JSON object.
ast.target: 返回请求的结构化 JSON 对象。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Import PDF and prepare for reading
ast.target: 导入 PDF 并准备阅读

ast.name: name
ast.source: Convert current PDF to Markdown only
ast.target: 仅将当前 PDF 转换为 Markdown

ast.name: name
ast.target: 为当前论文重建术语表

ast.name: name
ast.source: Extract terms and explain from current Markdown
ast.target: 从当前 Markdown 提取术语并解释

ast.name: name
ast.source: Enrich glossary with sep for current paper
ast.target: 使用 SEP 丰富当前论文的术语表

ast.name: name
ast.source: Highlight key sentences for current paper
ast.target: 为当前论文高亮关键句
